title: verbascum cheiranthifolium var. cataonicum
intro: Verbascum cheiranthifolium var. cataonicum, also known as Cataonian Mullein, is a plant species within the Verbascum genus, which is characterized by its large, showy flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cataonian Mullein include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are often used to make teas, salves, and creams that can be applied topically or ingested for its medicinal benefits.
